notes: TIMELAB target list v5. p50/p75 aligned to your TARGET LIST TL (Catawiki repeatable closes). Split mixed targets (Sinn, Hamilton, Seiko, Tudor, Nomos, Fortis, Montblanc). IMPORTANT: removed box/papers from exclusions (they are p75 drivers). Added p75_triggers_any to switch expected close from p50->p75 when listing looks full set/serviced/NOS. max_buy_eur set conservatively as ~0.75–0.80 * p50 (placeholder until we wire dynamic accounting).
